description_long: This object is a metallic shotgun with a sleek, elongated barrel and a distinct, angular frame. The body is primarily a dark gray metal, with a contrasting brown grip that appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material. The barrel is long and rectangular, with a smooth finish and minimal external detailing, suggesting a modern, utilitarian design. The grip is ergonomically shaped and slightly textured, providing a secure hold. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a visible trigger. There are no visible external mechanisms such as a pump or lever, and the overall construction appears robust and solid.
description: A modern, metallic shotgun with a long, smooth barrel and a brown ergonomic grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and minimal external detailing.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the circular barrel opening and the angular transition to the grip, with the trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_1: The side view showcases the full length of the barrel, the flat top, and the brown grip extending downward at an angle.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the back of the grip and the squared-off end of the shotgun, with the trigger guard and part of the barrel visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the uninterrupted length of the barrel and the grip, with minimal surface features.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and rectangular with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, enclosing the trigger with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
